item.title: Tung Tung Sahur is featured in the new season of Spongebob Squarepants! I guess Nickelodeon is really trying to appeal to the younger audience with italian brainrot.. In this episode Tung Tung Tung Sahur sells slop to Tralalero Tralala and Orcalero Orcala

item.title: Triple T is building a new home inside of Tralalero Tralala. Tralalero doesn't like that, so he gets help from Ballerina Cappuccina to remove Tung Tung Tung Sahur from his head. Italian Brainrot Cartoons generated with Seedance 2.0 #italianbrainrot #aislo
